prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 27900→26492→30114→37220→41752，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 13852 名，2025 年基准约 41752 名；物理类在粤计划数：2021–2023 年均为 48 人，2024 年增至 62 人，2025 年 64 人，2026 年大幅扩至 100 人，较 2025 年扩招约 56.3%，显著增加招生名额，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 90 位逐步下滑至 2026 年第 101 位，近年排名略有下降但仍属中上水平；2023 年曾出现师德师风类偏负面舆情（教师要求女生穿超短裙表演），但近年无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第 84 位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高，报考关注度平稳；安徽大学未收录于第五轮学科评估文件中，A- 及以上等级学科较少，学科竞争力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，与安徽大学物理类招生专业（软件工 程、电子科学与技术、人工智能等）高度匹配，有利于吸引考生；广东省 2026 年物理类考生约 456000 人，较 2025 年 440208 人增加约 3.6%，竞争基数扩大；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，对广东考生而言属于跨省报考，地域吸引力一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年大幅扩招约 56.3% 是影响位次的最关键因素，大幅增加名额将显著拉低位次（位次数字增大）；同时广东省物理类考生增加约 3.6% 及工科专业热度较高对位次有轻微上移作用（位次数字减小），但扩招效应占主导。预测最低位次约 55643 名，区间 55143–56143 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 27900→26492→30114→37220→41752, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13852 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 41752 in 2025; the planned enrollment in Guangdong for Physics Category: 48 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 62 in 2024, 64 in 2025, and significantly expanded to 100 in 2026, an increase of about 56.3% compared to 2025, substantially increasing enrollment slots and significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking gradually declined from 90th in 2021 to 101st in 2026, still at an upper-middle level despite a slight decline in recent years; in 2023, there was a somewhat negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (a teacher required female students to wear miniskirts for a performance), but no major negative events in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and stable application attention; Anhui University is not included in the fifth round of discipline evaluation documents, with relatively few disciplines rated A- or above, and limited disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which highly matches the Physics Category enrollment majors of Anhui University (Software Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), helping to attract candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the competition base; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, which is a cross-province application for Guangdong candidates, with average regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the significant expansion of about 56.3% in 2026 is the most critical factor affecting rankings, the substantial increase in slots will significantly lower the ranking (ranking number increases); meanwhile, the increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong and the high popularity of engineering majors have a slight upward effect on ranking (ranking number decreases), but the expansion effect dominates. The predicted minimum ranking is about 55,643, with a range of 55,143–56,143.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Anhui University's Physics Category significantly expands enrollment, with rankings expected to shift backward noticeably. It is recommended that candidates with rankings around 55,000–56,000 focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates with rankings above 56,000 can primarily consider Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors, with a higher probability of admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 6891→6656→7975→8777→8798 respectively. The rankings were relatively stable in 2021–2022, but shifted significantly downward from 2023 onward, with a cumulative decline of approximately 2142 places over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is about 8798. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong: 24 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 21 in 2024, 27 in 2025, and expanding to 39 in 2026, an increase of about 44.4% compared to 2025, significantly increasing the number of admissions.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked 101st on the Soft Science main ranking, with a slight decline in recent years. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (a teacher required female students to wear super short skirts for a performance), which had a certain negative impact on the application psychology of liberal arts candidates. Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with low exposure. Anhui University is not included in the fifth round of discipline evaluation documents, with few disciplines rated A- or above, and no outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, etc., are socially hot to recommended, partially matching Anhui University's History Category admission majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Economics, etc.). In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, with average cross-provincial appeal for Guangdong History Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The significant enrollment expansion of about 44.4% in 2026 is the most critical factor affecting rankings, which will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number). However, the substantial increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees will push the ranking upward (decrease the ranking number), partially offsetting the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10994, with a range of 10494–11494.
